name: megaphone
description: The 30-day distribution system for vibe coders. Nine focused Claude Code skills take a project from 'I shipped a thing' to launch with stars on GitHub: profile the project, generate copy/banner/demo, draft community-aware posts (Reddit per-sub, Show HN, Indie Hackers, Peerlist, Hashnode + feed platforms), run outreach (venues, amplifiers, personalised DMs, 30/14/6/0-day plan), publish locally to 7 platforms, schedule one-offs/cadences/launch sequences, audit landing + user journey, and track traction. Local-first; OAuth tokens never leave your machine.
